description: Noise texture is a component that procedurally generates a 2D texture with a random noise pattern like TV static.

fields.Seed: The number to use to seed the generation of the noise for the texture.
fields.Monochrome: Whether to make the noise generation use a mix of 2 colors rather than random colors.
fields.MonochromeMax: Color 1 to use for the noise texture when ``Monochrome`` is enabled.
fields.MonochromeMin: Color 2 to use for the noise texture when ``Monochrome`` is enabled.
fields.Bias: The bias to use more of ``MonochromeMax`` or ``MonochromeMin``
fields.Gain: How much to brighten the entire texture.
fields.Clamp: Whether to keep color ranges for the output from going beyond 1 and causing bloom.
